title: Delta Lake Solves Reliability Problems
summary: Plain lake files offer no built-in safety net. Delta Lake adds a transaction log on top of open Parquet files, bringing database-style reliability, time travel, and schema enforcement to low-cost storage.

context.headline: Loose files become trustworthy tables
context.description: A plain data lake is mainly a collection of files, with limited transactional guarantees. Delta Lake adds a transaction log on top of open Parquet files. A change only becomes visible once it is recorded in that log, which enables ACID-style reliability, time travel, schema enforcement, and a table format that can support both batch and streaming workloads.
context.when: From unreliable lake files to the foundation of the lakehouse
